metadata.description: The codebase intelligence layer for AI coding agents — graph, git, docs, decisions, and a defect-validated code-health score, exposed to Claude through nine task-shaped MCP tools.

plugins.name: repowise
plugins.description: Codebase intelligence for Claude Code. Indexes your repo into five layers (Graph, Git, Docs, Decisions, Code Health) and gives Claude deep understanding of architecture, ownership, hotspots, decisions, and defect risk — fewer greps, fewer file reads, lower cost per query.
